overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a medieval action RPG showing an armored character walking through a sunlit stone courtyard toward a rustic building entrance. The character moves steadily forward, transitioning from bright outdoor sunlight into a shadowed stone passageway.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone courtyard approaching medieval building entrance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the stone building entrance while wearing medieval armor and a hooded cloak

entered.detail: weathered stone and brick wall with an open doorway
large wooden-framed entrance with dark interior
lit lantern mounted on the building wall beside the door
low crumbling stone wall running alongside the path
stack of burlap sacks piled near the entrance
wooden barrel sitting beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sunlit stone courtyard toward a medieval building entrance. The path is flanked by a low stone wall on the right and a wooden barrel on the left, while the stone facade and open doorway loom ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone passageway through medieval building

events.description: character enters the dark stone doorway, transitioning from outdoor courtyard to enclosed passage
lighting shifts from bright natural sunlight to shadowed interior as character passes under the door frame

agents.ego_description: walking through the doorway into the dark stone passage, moving toward the light visible at the far exit

entered.detail: rough stone interior walls of the narrow passageway
distant green landscape visible through the far end of the passage

segments.scene_description: The character enters the dark stone passageway, leaving the sunlit courtyard behind. The rough stone walls enclose the path as the character moves toward the distant green landscape visible through the far exit, with the lantern now hanging overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character transitions from a bright, open courtyard into the dim confines of a stone passageway. It begins with the character walking across sunlit stone, passing a wooden barrel and a low wall while heading toward a looming building entrance. As the character crosses the threshold, the brilliant outdoor light fades, and the scene shifts into a shadowed corridor enclosed by rough stone walls. The camera then follows the character deeper into the passage under a hanging lantern, moving steadily toward a distant glimpse of a green landscape visible through the far exit.
